commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation run mklog-160 --rm -i --restart=Never --image=busybox:1.36 --overrides={"spec":{"nodeSelector":{"kubernetes.io/hostname":"ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal"},"tolerations":[{"key":"nvidia.com/gpu","operator":"Equal","value":"true","effect":"NoSchedule"}],"containers":[{"name":"x","image":"busybox:1.36","command":["sh","-c","mkdir -p /h/yanxi-logs/stage2 && chmod 1777 /h/yanxi-logs && ls -ld /h/yanxi-logs"],"volumeMounts":[{"name":"h","mountPath":"/h"}]}],"volumes":[{"name":"h","hostPath":{"path":"/var/lib"}}]}} 2>&1 | tail -10'
